Video.summary: A couple want to evict their violent 31-year-old son, while their son blames his parents for his financial struggles.
Video.title: Our Son is a Violent Mooch

Image.alt: Our Son is a Violent Mooch
Our Son is a Violent Mooch
Our Son is a Violent Mooch
Our Son is a Violent Mooch
Our Son is a Violent Mooch
Our Son is a Violent Mooch
Our Son is a Violent Mooch

Video.summary: Parents: If your teen talks back, acts out or is just plain rude, you better tune in!
Video.title: Rude Teens

Video.summary: How well do you know your neighbors, your friends or even your child's teacher? An estimated four to eight million people in North America are swinging in the suburbs " mostly middle-class folks from all walks of life. Dr. Phil takes you inside the secret world of swingers, a lifestyle where couples swap partners.
Video.title: Secrets in the Suburbs

Video.summary: A headline making story of a husband’s affair with a co-worker that led to murder. Now the wife and the mistress come face to face for the first time.
Video.title: A Deadly Love Affair

Video.summary: Statistics show that 2,000 teens get pregnant every day. Moms and dads: Watch this show with your teenagers, because it can impact their lives and yours! Two families face off over who should raise baby Miley. Paige, 17, and her boyfriend, Jordan, 18, are determined to raise their child on their own, even though they live with Jordan’s dad, Chris. Nikki, Paige’s stepmom, thinks she and her husband should raise the child, because they can better provide for her, and she wants Paige to break up with Jordan. Why does she believe that Jordan is brainwashing Paige? The teen dad says Nikki is the one who’s controlling, and he’s stepped up to the plate. Will the families come to an agreement? See what Dr. Phil tells them they must do to ensure Miley grows up in a healthy environment. Plus, find out the 10 things teens want their parents to know about teen sex.
Video.title: Fight Over Teen's Baby

Video.summary: Every bride wants to shine on her special day -- from wearing the perfect gown to hosting the most extravagant reception. But what happens when the dream of the perfect wedding turns into a nightmare? Janae knows about this pain firsthand. Her husband, Michael, got so drunk before the ceremony that he passed out cold after saying “I do” and didn’t wake up until the next day! Janae attended the reception by herself and spent her wedding night with her bridesmaids at a hotel. Their wedding from hell took place two years ago, but she still tears up at the memory of that fateful day. Can she ever forgive Michael's mishaps, or is he doomed to the doghouse forever? Then, Angela is a self-professed bridezilla who makes no excuses for her demanding ways. She even created a newsletter for her bridesmaids with the rules and regulations they must follow to participate in her wedding! Her sister and maid of honor, Vanessa, worries that Angela's nitpicking will cause her fiancé, Marvin, to run for the hills. What's behind Angela's controlling behavior, and is she headed for heartache on her special day?
Video.title: Hell Weddings

Video.summary: More couples get divorced in the first year of marriage than any other. Dr. Phil talks with newlyweds in crisis about having realistic expectancies and re-negotiating within the relationship.
Video.title: Was Our Marriage a Mistake?

Video.summary: Phyllis and Barry say they're desperate to calm their violent 15-year-old son, Brandon, and turn to Dr. Phil for help. Their requests for Brandon to perform simple tasks such as brushing his teeth or bathing cause him to go into a rage, breaking things and punching holes in walls, and even chasing Phyllis with scissors. Barry says they walk on eggshells, waiting for Brandon’s next violent outburst and that every day he leaves the house worried that his wife may not be alive when he returns. What is at the root of Brandon's anger? Dr. Phil spends some one-on-one time with the young man to determine what’s driving his behavior. And, find out what Phyllis recently found in Brandon’s room that shocked her to her core.
Video.title: Teenage Rage

Video.summary: A mother who is afraid of her 17-year-old son seeks help.
Video.title: At War with My Teen

Video.summary: When he last appeared on Dr. Phil, Kip’s brazen and outrageous tirade toward his 17-year-old stepdaughter, Tory, shocked audience members and viewers. But the married father of two refused to back down. When Tory broke down in tears, Kip finally agreed to find a calmer way to express his frustration. Just weeks later, Tory’s mother, Vicky, says the surly relationship has not only gotten worse, the hostility has escalated, and her patience is running thin. She says both Tory and Kip refuse to seek help, and now there is a new bombshell that is making their home life virtually unbearable. What does Kip say is his biggest issue with his stepdaughter? And, will this family finally agree to accept help and repair what’s left of their relationship? Then, Joe, 34, became an instant father to two teenage daughters. One of the girls has run away, and the other feels that he treats her like a slave. Can they resolve their disputes and come together as one? (FOLLOW UP FROM 9093)
Video.title: My Teen Can’t Stand Her Stepfather

Image.alt: My Teen Can’t Stand Her Stepfather
My Teen Can’t Stand Her Stepfather
My Teen Can’t Stand Her Stepfather
My Teen Can’t Stand Her Stepfather
My Teen Can’t Stand Her Stepfather
My Teen Can’t Stand Her Stepfather
My Teen Can’t Stand Her Stepfather

Video.summary: Amanda Knox spent four years locked in an Italian prison for the murder of her British roommate Meredith Kercher. Dubbed “Foxy Knoxy” by the press, she became one of the most famous cases of wrongful conviction. She tells her story, as she fights to save the life of Texas death row inmate Rodney Reed. This program contains graphic discussion about a criminal case. Viewer discretion advised.
Video.title: Amanda Knox: Freeing The Innocent

Video.summary: Living with an alcoholic parent is one of the most difficult and heart-wrenching experiences a child can go through. Heather, 28, and Alexandra, 21, say their mother, Joey, is a pathetic drunk, and if she doesn't get clean once and for all, they will walk away from her forever.
Video.title: Sober Up Or Else!

Video.summary: Every day, many teen girls fear for their lives because of obsessive, controlling and abusive boyfriends, and it’s another reason why Dr. Phil is so passionate about his campaign to End the Silence on Domestic Violence. Seventeen-year-old Samantha sent an urgent plea for help to Dr. Phil. She says her ex-boyfriend, Aaron, called her nonstop for weeks and sent her threatening text messages after she broke up with him. After Samantha changed her number, he began calling her mother repeatedly. Samantha says he showed up unannounced at her house and pounded on the door for 45 minutes while she cowered in a locked closet. She says she’s afraid Aaron could even kill her. Dr. Phil sits down with the two teens to help Samantha get her message to Aaron loud and clear. And, Tiffany, 20, has a cautionary tale of survival every teen needs to hear. It could save her life!
Video.title: Teens Obsessed With Love

Video.summary: Jessica says she was instantly attracted to Jason, known as “Tank D.,” one of the stars of CMT’s hit show Redneck Island, and they started dating. But now, Jessica claims the man she loved for over 18 months is an arrogant, self-centered narcissist who cares more about partying and verbally trashing her than their 6-month-old baby son. Jessica says she believes this reality show "celebrity" is not only a deadbeat dad but an abusive, manipulating narcissist who is acting inappropriately with his female fans and firmly believes he cheated on her with Katie, a co-star from Redneck Island. Jason says Jessica knew he was wild from the start and failed to tame his bad boy ways. He admits he’s called Jessica names but adamantly denies he’s ever been physically abusive toward her. Jason says Jessica needs to stop using their son as a manipulative tool, because they are not together. Jason 100 percent denies cheating with Katie on season 5 of Redneck Island, but Katie says otherwise -- and in a shocking revelation, Katie reveals the full truth to Jessica. Will Jason continue to deny the affair or finally admit to cheating?
Video.title: Reality TV Baby Daddy Drama

Video.summary: He’s a tough-guy afraid of loosing his freedom. She’s been through two ugly divorces. So when the “M” word comes up, they head for the hills. Join these commitment-challenged singles as Dr. Phil uncovers the reasons why they won’t take the plunge. You’ll also meet a man who, after a four years in a loving relationship, doesn’t see the need to get married. To him it’s just a piece of paper. To her it’s a lot more. Find out if it’s really a “deal breaker.”
Video.title: Commitment Phobia

Video.summary: What happens when an unhealthy teen relationship threatens to tear a mother and daughter apart? Giesel says her 18-year-old daughter, Devynn, is obsessed with her boyfriend and is damaging a once promising future. Watch the drama unfold as a pregnancy scare rocks this teen's life.
Video.title: Teen Love Trauma

Video.summary: Brenda says she fell in love with and married her husband, Don – despite their 26-year age gap. But soon after, she claims her “Prince Charming” turned “crazy” and “temperamental.” Is their age difference at the root of their issues? Then, Bev says she’s concerned for her sister, Melanie, who married her much younger man, Devar, after meeting him on a Jamaican vacation. Is Devar in it for love, or for a green card and money? And, Dr. Phil catches up with best-selling author Mitch Albom.
Video.title: Regret Marrying Older Spouse

Video.summary: Samantha and her sister Sarah say their mother, Stacy, is very successful as a special education teacher and behaviorist, but hey claim their mother has allowed their 33 year old brother Ben to live rent free for the past 2 years, while he lays by the pool. Stacy’s husband, Doug, says he moved out and refuses to come home until Stacy kicks his stepson out of the house. Ben insists he is not taking advantage of his mother’s hospitality and kindness; he is just stuck in a rut.
Video.title: Mom Needs to Cut the Cord

Image.alt: Mom Needs to Cut the Cord
Mom Needs to Cut the Cord
Mom Needs to Cut the Cord
Mom Needs to Cut the Cord
Mom Needs to Cut the Cord
Mom Needs to Cut the Cord
Mom Needs to Cut the Cord

Video.summary: Pedophiles once lurked in parks and around schoolyards, and then they prowled the playground of the World Wide Web. Now these predators have a more sinister method at their fingertips sending explicit text messages directly to your child's cell phone. Dr. Phil examines the latest technological threats to your kids and shows you how to protect them.
Video.title: Pursuing the Predator

Video.summary: Meleah and Greg's young love story started and ended like so many. But when Meleah discovered she was pregnant following their breakup, their lives became forever intertwined. Watch as sparks fly when they face off! Plus, Paige was a teen mom struggling to make ends meet. You won't want to miss her remarkable update!
Video.title: Baby After Breakup

Video.summary: Parents are concerned about the extreme measures their daughters take to get and keep a boyfriend.
Video.title: Teens Obsessed with Love

Video.summary: Christina, 21, and her younger sister, Carlie, 13, say they had a close relationship with their father, Michael, until two years ago when he decided to transition to a female. Michael was a police officer, soldier and loving parent who lived his life as a male for 40 years. Now, he wants his daughters to call him Mom, because he says Dad is gone, but they refuse. Michael, who prefers to be called Kayla, says she wants to explain to her daughters why she's living as a woman, but they've never given her the chance. The last time Christina saw her father was two years ago when he showed up at her work in lace and blue jeans to break the news that he's transgendered. When she sees Kayla onstage, does she greet her with open arms? Next, Carlie joins her sister and father. She says she wants her old dad back, but will she feel the same after seeing Kayla? Can the father-daughter bond be turned into a mother-daughter one? Be prepared for an emotional journey as two daughters struggle to understand how someone they loved so much could hurt them so badly.
Video.title: Daddy Drama

Video.summary: In part two, will accused liar Sarah, who fibbed about having cancer, miscarriage and muscular dystrophy, change her ways?
Video.title: Liar,Liar: Sarah Faces Her Accusers

Video.summary: We live in a culture that glamorizes svelte celebrities from Angelina Jolie to Nicole Richie. But some women put their lives in jeopardy for the sake of being skinny.
Video.title: Scary Skinny

Video.summary: Are deadbeat dads actually dead broke dads? As the American economy struggles, men comprise most of the recent layoffs. In child support cases, are men and women treated equally in the courts, or are the laws out of touch with today's crisis? Dr. Phil's guests, along with Mel Feit, director of the National Center for Men, and Lis Wiehl, author and legal analyst, debate the issue that has many men feeling like the laws are against them.
Video.title: Fathers And Finance

Video.summary: Lavena says her 17-year-old son, Trevor, has an out-of-control rage problem and fears he could snap and kill her, her husband, her 5-year-old twins -- or become the next school gunman. And, Karen says she’s at her wits’ end with her 15-year-old daughter, Nicole, who she says sneaks out of the house, uses drugs, skips school and recently stole her car. What’s at the root of the teens’ behavior?
Video.title: Tyrannical Teens

Video.summary: A woman believes she's going to be Vladimir Putin's wife.
Video.title: Homeless and “Engaged” to Putin?

Video.summary: Dr. Phil blows the whistle on what many parents are doing wrong. Find out if you're guilty of making the same mistakes.
Video.title: Child Discipline Done Right

Video.summary: These parents say their precious daughters have turned into bullies. Dr. Phil spells out how "commando parenting" will reshape the behavior of their "little mean girls."
Video.title: Little Mean Girls

Video.summary: Is there an adult under your roof, eating your food and taking advantage of you financially? If yes, then you live with a moocher! It's time to stop the enabling and start the accountability.
Video.title: Cut 'Em Off!

Video.summary: Parents seek Dr. Phil's help for an out-of-control teen.
Video.title: Car Stealing Drug Taking Daughter

Video.summary: Stay-at-home mom Jessica claims her soon-to-be ex-husband of 23 years, Mike, is a narcissist who controls everything in her and their teenage daughters’ lives, especially the finances. Sixteen-year-old Chloe and 18-year-old Zoey say the worst thing he did was to shatter their dreams of becoming professional dancers in New York City. But Mike claims Jessica is putting the girls in the middle of their fight and brainwashing them to hate him. Dr. Phil tells Mike and Jessica what every couple needs to do with children when their marriage falls apart.
Video.title: Dance Dreams Shattered
